text.title: Senior Promotion Case Template (Outsource Shop) Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 4-step procedure to apply Senior Promotion Case Template (Outsource Shop). Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: collect-engagements
step.action: Pick 2-3 engagements with sufficient evidence (≥3 months each).
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: draft-impact
step.action: For each engagement, write impact in client-business terms (revenue, retention, scope expansion), not internal metrics.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: frame-leadership
step.action: Frame leadership across engagements (mentorship, scope ownership, escalation handling).
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: commit-the-bar
step.action: Cross-check every claim against the senior-level rubric; reject anchor-less prose.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
